name: stream-sphere-hls-lambda
description: AWS Lambda: parallel HLS transcoding (360p / 720p / 1080p) + AI pipeline

notes.aws-sdk: All @aws-sdk/* packages are listed in devDependencies only — they are bundled with the Lambda Node.js 20 runtime and do NOT need to be in the zip. Only 'axios' and 'fluent-ffmpeg' need to be present in node_modules when you zip the function.

handlers.orchestrator.handler: S3-triggered entry point — fan-out coordinator (512 MB, 13 min timeout)
handlers.renditionWorker.handler: Invoked by orchestrator — one rendition per call (2048 MB, 12 min timeout)
handlers.aiWorker.handler: Invoked by orchestrator — AI + thumbnail + preview (1024 MB, 10 min timeout)
